_comment: ay_platform_ui/public/runtime-config.json — DEPLOYMENT-TIME runtime config. Mountable from a K8s ConfigMap so the API URL can change without rebuilding the Next.js bundle. Empty `apiBaseUrl` means relative URLs (same-origin via Traefik in prod, Next.js dev rewrites in dev). Override to e.g. `https://api.example.com` when the UX is hosted on a different origin.
